source_cross_reference.narrative_output_persistence: run_golden_panel.py lines 354-360: dto.model_dump() serialised to analysis_result.json; narrative_report_v1 included (only 'lifestyle' key is excluded)
critical_execution_warnings: narrative.txt in golden_runs is NOT NarrativeReportV1 output. run_golden_panel.py lines 411-419 write narrative.txt as insight[].description strings only. Cursor must read analysis_result.json['narrative_report_v1'] for the compiled narrative sections.

No post-N-8 AB golden run artifact exists in repo. Most recent golden run (backend/artifacts/golden_runs/20260405T085509Z, Apr 5 2026) predates N-8 commits (Apr 21 2026). ab-manual-001 (Mar 19 2026) also predates N-8 and has no narrative.txt. Cursor must generate fresh artifact: python backend/tools/run_golden_panel.py --fixture backend/tests/fixtures/panels/ab_full_panel_with_ranges.json --run-id ab-n8-validation

No AB-specific lifestyle fixture exists in backend/tests/fixtures/. Answered questionnaire (docs/golden-narrative/AB_SPECIFIC_QUESTIONNAIRE_TEMPLATE_v1_ANSWERED.json) has lifestyle data in questionnaire format, not the canonical lifestyle_inputs format. Cursor must either run without lifestyle modifier or manually derive a lifestyle fixture from the questionnaire answers. Either choice must be declared in the validation output.
Age discrepancy: ab_full_panel_with_ranges.json user.age=58 vs questionnaire answer age=59. Must be noted in validation artifact.
